DOWNLOAD_RESTRICTION: Restrict file download for students (Only available for images and PDF)
FILE_CANNOT_UPLOAD_INITIALIZE_ERROR: It looks like your file name contains a dot (.). Please ensure the file name does not include any dots before the extension (e.g., report.pdf is acceptable, but my.report.pdf is not). Rename your file and try uploading again.

MODAL_CONFIRMATION: Are you sure you want to delete

ASSIGNMENTLISTCOMPONENT_THE EASIEST WAY: The easiest way to collect assignments from students
CHAPTER_CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to delete this chapter?
SUB_CHAPTER_CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to delete this sub chapter?

NO_CLASS: No classes scheduled for the day.

NETWORK_CONNECTION_ERROR: Your are offline. Please check your internet connection.
OFFLINE: Internet connection not found, You are in offline mode.
NO_SCHEDULES_FOUND: No schedules available for this week.
WORK_DAY_NOT_CONFIGURED: No working day and dayorder configuration found.
GRAD_BOOK_DESC: The easiest way to give marks to the students
ONE_FILE_CAN_BE_LOADED_AGAINST_TO_A_FILE: One file can be loaded against to a file name
DO_YOU_WANT_TO_OVER_WRITE_THE_FILE: Do you want to over-write the existing file upload ?
NO_GRADE_ITEMS_FOUND: You haven't assigned any course work yet.
INVALID_POINTS: This is an invalid grade. Please enter
NO_Stud_ASNMT_FOUND: This student does not have a submission for this assignment
LEARNERS_CANT_ACCESS_ITEM: This item is private to you, learners cannot access it.
MAXIMUM_FILES_UPLOAD_ASSGN_CNT: You can upload files up to a maximum of 2 GB
SETTING_TO_MEET_ASSGN_CNT: Customize the settings to meet your grading approach for the activity
RULES_ACTIVITY_ASSGN_CNT: Set up rules for the activity
DUE_DATE_LEARNERS_ASSGN_CNT: Submission must be done before the due date by the Learners
LEARNERS_SUBMIT_DUE_DATE_ASSGN_CNT: Learners can continue to submit after the due date
RANGE_STUDENT_ACTIVITY_ASSGN_CNT: Set up a date range for when students can access this activity.
SPECIFIC_GROUP_STU_ASSGN_CNT: Assign to a specific group of students
ASSIGNMENT_MISSED: The assignment is missed & cannot be submitted
ASSIGNMENT_SUBMITTED_LATE: hrs this assignment will be submitted late
INTERACT_COURSE_SETTING: Control how students interact with the course
NAVIGATE_COURSE_SEETTING: How do you want the Learners to navigate through the course
STEP_SEQUENCE_SETTING: Requires the user to progress through the course in the designated step sequence
WITH_OUT_STEP_SEQUENCE_SETTING: Allows the user to move freely through the course without following the designated step sequence
DELETE_CHAPTER: and all its sub chapters will be deleted. Do you want to proceed?
DELETE_SUBCHAPTER: and all its content will be deleted. Do you want to proceed?
PRE_REQ_CONDITION: Define the pre-requisites and conditions for access to this content
LOCK_DATE_PRE_REQ: Students will be able to see the module titles and module item names, but they will not be able to access the module items until after the lock date has passed.
ARRANG_ELEME_PRE_REQ: Design is a plan for arranging elements in such a way as best to accomplish a particular purpose.
REQ_STUD_PRE_REQ: Student must complete all of these requirements
ADD_QUS_CAMU: It will be added from camu question bank
NO_QUIZ_FOUND: You haven't assigned any quiz yet
CUSTOM_SETTING_QUIZ: Customize the settings on how the quiz should work
IMMEDIAT_ANSWER_QUIZ: Immediately after every answer is submitted
QUIZ_ONCE LEARNER: Once a learner retries the quiz, the previously saved quiz results for the learner will be overwritten. The number of quiz attempts will be saved.
SET_UP_RULES: Set up rules for the activity
PROCTORING_TOOL_QUIZ: Students will be monitored by the proctoring tool while taking the quiz
DISCARD_MSG: Are you sure you want to discard your changes?
CONFIRM_ONLINE_SCHEDULE: Are you sure you want to create an online class for this period?
ONLINE_CLASS_NOT_YET_STARTED: The online class is not yet started by the instructor. Please try again after sometime.
ONLINE_ATTENDANCE_NOT_RECORDED: Your attendance cannot be recorded, please contact your faculty
ONLINE_ATTENDANCE_CONFIRM: Do you want to record attendance before joining the meeting?
ONLINE_MEET_ACCESSABILITY: Meeting is accessible only in the scheduled date
SCHEDULE_ONLINE_MEET: Add online meeting to this period
ADD_MEET_LINK_DESC: Students will be able to join online class for this period with this link
SINGLE_FILE_UPLOAD_INITIALIZE_ERROR: Please add  one attachment and upload, it supports only single file attachment.
NO_QUIZ_SUBMISSION: No submissions have been made yet
LMS_DESC: Camu can make your learners engaging and you creative
RESET_DESC: Enter your user name to reset your password. You will receive an instruction to the Email ID associated with the user name. If you are experiencing problems resetting your password send us an email
RUB_DEL_CONTENT: This action will remove this rubric association from all assignments.
RUBRICS_CONTENT: Scoring tool that explicitly describes the instructor's performance expectations for an assignment or piece of work.
RUBRIC_DUPLICATE: Rubric with this name already exists
RUBRICS_DESC: A way of providing transparency in assessment
ASSGN_RATING_ERROR: Rubric total should match the assignment total
RUBRIC_HOVER_INFO: Rubrics cannot be modified already they have been used.
EDIT_RUBRIC_CONSRAINT: You can't edit this rubric, either because you don't have permission or it's being used in more than one place. Any changes you make will result in a new rubric based on the old rubric. Continue anyway?
CONTROL_STUD_INTRACT_WITH_COURSE: Control how students interact with the course
GRADE_SCHEME_INSTRUCTION: To measure score against a specific standard
GRADE_CONFIG_INFO: Grade categories must add up to 100%
TREAT_UNGRADE_INFO: Assigns a value of 0 as the points received for all ungraded items.
GRADE_CAT_INFO: Use grade category for final grade calculation
GRADE_INFO: Control how the grades are displayed to the students
OVERALL_GRADE_CONFIG_IN_ASSGNMENT: Do not count this assignment towards the final grade
OVERALL_GRADE_CONFIG_INFO_ASSGNMENT: Allows you to provide feedback without the assignment counting toward Gradebook calculations
OVERALL_GRADE_LETTER_INFO: Assignment will not count toward grade if letter grading was being used
DOWNLOAD_ASSIGNMENT_SUBMISSION_INFO: Your student submissions will be downloaded as a compressed zip file.
PENDING_ALREADY_EXISTS: Cannot download, Student submissions are already being gathered and compressed into a zip file.
DWNLD_SUB_REP_HEADER: Your student submissions are being gathered and compressed into a zip file.

DWNLD_SUB_REP_SUCCESS_HEADER: Student submissions are ready to download
DWNLD_SUB_REP_SUCCESS_CONTENT: Download from here if the file was not downloaded automatically

NO_UNGRADED_STUD: No ungraded student to show for this assignment
NO_MISSED_STUD: No missed student to show for this assignment
DROPPED_STUDENT_FEEDBACK: Cannot grade and provide feedback student dropped
CONTENT_CANNOT_BE_DRAGGED: The item cannot be moved when it’s configured as requirement for other items.
ASSIGNMENT_SUBMISSION_ERROR: submissions couldn’t be  download, Please try again

STAFF_NOT_HAVE_COURSE_CONTENT: You do not have any course content,start adding them!

REQ_DESC: This process may take a few minutes. Stay or come back later.

NO_SEM_CNFG: Start date and end date missing in semester configuration.
ARCHIVE_THIS_COURSE: Archive this course once the semester ends
ARCHIVE_MAIN_CONTENT: Archiving a course is particularly useful at the end of the semester, especially for courses no longer in active use. Both you and your learners will still be able to access the course. Learners will only have access to activities as 'read-only'.
ARCHIVE_GRADE_BOOK: Course is archived, cannot view gradebook
ARCHIVE_COURSE_CONTENT: Course is archived, cannot view course content
ARCHIVE_ASSIGNMENT: Course is archived, cannot view assignment
ARCHIVE_QUIZ: Course is archived, cannot view quiz
ARCHIVE_COURSE: Course is archived, cannot view assignment
COURSE_ARCHIVE_MSG_STAFF: Course is archived. Some features will not work for students.
COURSE_ARCHIVE_MSG_STUDENT: Course is archived. Some features will not work.
IMPORT_CONFIRMATION_CONTENTS: While importing course at chapter and subchapter level, the prerequisites and requirements are set as blank for imported course. Have to set prerequisites and requirements.

SEARCH_BY_FILE_NAME_TAGS: Search by file name or tags
